evals.prompt: Show me a complete example of a PostgreSQL schema for an online store that works with NocoDB and NocoBase. I need users, products, orders, and categories at minimum.
evals.expected_output: Complete schema with CREATE TABLE statements, FK constraints, indexes, and a relation summary. Uses serial PK, text types, decimal for prices, timestamp for dates. All relations have ON DELETE NO ACTION.

expectations.text: Includes at minimum: users, products, orders, categories tables
Every relation has an explicit ALTER TABLE ADD CONSTRAINT with FOREIGN KEY
Every FK column has a CREATE INDEX
Includes a relation summary showing table→table: relation type
All tables use serial or bigserial primary keys
No ENUM, ARRAY, jsonb, UUID, INHERITS used anywhere
